mapper.delete: ALTER TABLE TBL_DOMAIN_CPU_DETAIL DELETE WHERE TIME < #{time}
mapper.select: SELECT CPU_RATE as cpuRate, MEMORY as memory, CPU_USAGE_MHZ as cpuUsageMhz, CPU_READY as cpuReady, TIME as time FROM TBL_DOMAIN_CPU_DETAIL WHERE TIME BETWEEN ${startTime} AND ${endTime} AND DOMAIN_ID = ${domainId} ORDER BY TIME ASC

select b.uuid as uuid, a.TIME as time, a.CPU_RATE as cpuRate, a.MEMORY as memory from (select TIME,CPU_RATE,MEMORY,DOMAIN_ID from TBL_DOMAIN_CPU_DETAIL WHERE TIME BETWEEN ${startTime} AND ${endTime} AND CLUSTER_ID = ${clusterId}) as a join ${@com.h3c.h3cloud.performance.monitor.service.mapper.base.clickhouseMapperConstant@TBL_DOMAIN} as b on a.DOMAIN_ID=b.id order by uuid, time

SELECT ROUND(AVG(domainCpu.CPU_RATE),2) as cpuRate, ROUND(AVG(domainCpu.MEMORY),2) as memory, domainCpu.TIME as time FROM TBL_DOMAIN_CPU_DETAIL domainCpu , ${@com.h3c.h3cloud.performance.monitor.service.mapper.base.clickhouseMapperConstant@TBL_DRX_VM} drxVm WHERE domainCpu.DOMAIN_ID=drxVm.domain_id AND drxVm.drx_business_id=${drxbId} AND TIME BETWEEN ${startTime} AND ${endTime} GROUP BY domainCpu.TIME ORDER BY domainCpu.TIME ASC

SELECT domainCpu.DOMAIN_ID as domainId,domain.title as title,
SUM(domainCpu.CPU_RATE) as cpuRate
SUM(domainCpu.MEMORY) as memory
FROM TBL_DOMAIN_CPU_DETAIL domainCpu , ${@com.h3c.h3cloud.performance.monitor.service.mapper.base.clickhouseMapperConstant@TBL_DRX_VM} drxVm, ${@com.h3c.h3cloud.performance.monitor.service.mapper.base.clickhouseMapperConstant@TBL_DOMAIN} domain WHERE domainCpu.DOMAIN_ID=drxVm.domain_id AND drxVm.domain_id=domain.id AND drxVm.drx_business_id=${drxbId} AND domainCpu.TIME BETWEEN ${startTime} AND ${endTime} GROUP BY domainCpu.DOMAIN_ID,domain.title
ORDER BY cpuRate DESC
ORDER BY memory DESC
LIMIT 5
SELECT MIN(MEMORY) as memory, DOMAIN_ID as domainId FROM TBL_DOMAIN_CPU_DETAIL WHERE TIME BETWEEN ${startTime} AND ${endTime} AND DOMAIN_ID IN(${vmIds}) GROUP BY DOMAIN_ID

SELECT T1.DOMAIN_ID as domainId, T1.CPU_RATE as cpuRate, T1.MEMORY as memory, T1.TIME as time FROM TBL_DOMAIN_CPU_DETAIL T1 , (SELECT DOMAIN_ID, MAX(TIME) TIME FROM TBL_DOMAIN_CPU_DETAIL GROUP BY DOMAIN_ID) T2 WHERE T1.HOST_ID =${hostId} AND T1.DOMAIN_ID = T2.DOMAIN_ID AND T1.TIME = T2.TIME

SELECT DETAIL.DOMAIN_ID as domainId, DOMAIN.domain_name as domainName, DOMAIN.host_id as hostId, DOMAIN.cluster_id as clusterId, DOMAIN.title as title,
ROUND(AVG(DETAIL.CPU_RATE),2) as cpuRate
ROUND(AVG(DETAIL.MEMORY),2) as memory
FROM TBL_DOMAIN_CPU_DETAIL DETAIL , ${@com.h3c.h3cloud.performance.monitor.service.mapper.base.clickhouseMapperConstant@TBL_DOMAIN} DOMAIN, ${@com.h3c.h3cloud.performance.monitor.service.mapper.base.clickhouseMapperConstant@TBL_DRX_VM} DRX WHERE DRX.drx_business_id =${drxbId} AND DRX.flag = 1 AND DRX.domain_id = DOMAIN.id AND DRX.domain_id = DETAIL.DOMAIN_ID AND DETAIL.TIME BETWEEN ${startTime} AND ${endTime} AND DOMAIN.status = 2 GROUP BY DETAIL.DOMAIN_ID,DOMAIN.domain_name, DOMAIN.host_id, DOMAIN.cluster_id, DOMAIN.title
ORDER BY cpuRate ASC
ORDER BY memory ASC
LIMIT ${limit}

select
tdio.CPU_RATE as cpuRate,
tdio.MEMORY as memory,
tdio.DOMAIN_ID as domainId, tdio.TIME as time from (SELECT
SUM(cpuDetail.CPU_RATE) sumcpu,
SUM(cpuDetail.MEMORY) sumcpu,
cpuDetail.DOMAIN_ID FROM TBL_DOMAIN_CPU_DETAIL cpuDetail , ${@com.h3c.h3cloud.performance.monitor.service.mapper.base.clickhouseMapperConstant@TBL_DOMAIN} domain WHERE cpuDetail.DOMAIN_ID = domain.id AND cpuDetail.TIME BETWEEN ${startTime} AND ${endTime}
AND cpuDetail.CLUSTER_ID in (${clusterIds})
AND cpuDetail.HOST_ID in (${hostIds})
AND cpuDetail.DOMAIN_ID in (${vmIds})
AND cpuDetail.OP_GROUP_CODE LIKE #{operatorGroupCode}
GROUP BY cpuDetail.DOMAIN_ID ORDER BY sumcpu DESC LIMIT ${limit}) t left join TBL_DOMAIN_CPU_DETAIL tdio on t.DOMAIN_ID=tdio.DOMAIN_ID WHERE tdio.TIME BETWEEN ${startTime} AND ${endTime} ORDER BY tdio.TIME
